method_basis: BEAM-style narrative arc + LongMemEval first-disclosure tagging

stable_traits_disclosable_anywhere.comment: These persona facts may be disclosed organically in any beat. They are NOT first-disclosure-locked to a beat. Agents should sprinkle naturally — not all at once.

facts.age_33: 33 years old (was 32 at arc start, turns 33 in beat 7)
facts.lives_cdmx_roma_norte: lives in Mexico City, Roma Norte neighborhood
facts.moved_to_cdmx_2yr: moved to CDMX 2 years before arc start
facts.employer_brujula: works at Brújula Logistics, Series B last-mile delivery startup, ~120 employees
facts.team_logistics_platform: on the Logistics Platform team, 6 backend engineers
facts.education_itesm_2014: graduated ITESM (Tec de Monterrey) Guadalajara 2014, BSc CS
facts.vegetarian_trigger_dad_surgery: became vegetarian after watching dad's cardiac bypass in 2022
facts.kickbox_atlas_box: kickboxes at Atlas Box CDMX in Colonia Juárez, Mon/Wed/Fri
facts.yerba_mate_habit: drinks 4-6 cups yerba mate per day
facts.bombilla_from_abuela: drinks from bombilla cup gifted by maternal grandmother Mama Lupita in 2017, engraved 'Seb'
facts.languages_spanish_english_portuguese: speaks Spanish (native), English (fluent), learning Portuguese (B1, for Camila's family)
facts.camila_5yr_relationship: 5-year relationship with Camila Ferreira, Argentinean-Brazilian architect, age 30
facts.camila_foster_partners: Camila works at Foster + Partners CDMX office
facts.met_camila_oaxaca_wedding: met Camila at a friend's wedding in Oaxaca, late 2021
facts.honda_crv_la_torta: drives 2018 Honda CR-V silver, nicknamed 'La Torta'
facts.vinyl_collection_150: owns ~150 vinyl records, Latin jazz heavy
facts.thinkpad_t480_nixos: personal laptop is ThinkPad T480 running NixOS
facts.macbook_pro_m2_work: work laptop is MacBook Pro M2 16in
facts.iphone_resentful: uses iPhone 15 Pro, was Pixel before, resentful
facts.mom_isabela_retired_nurse: mom Isabela Castellanos, 62, retired pediatric nurse, lives Guadalajara
facts.dad_hugo_retired_teacher: dad Hugo Río, 66, retired physics teacher, lives Guadalajara
facts.brother_mateo_28_designer: brother Mateo, 28, software designer in Tijuana
facts.best_friend_pablo: best friend Pablo Mendoza, mechanical engineer, kickboxing partner
facts.coach_profe_esteban: kickboxing coach Esteban 'Profe' Domínguez, 61, ex-pro from Tijuana
facts.ramen_at_nudo: ramen obsession at 'Nudo' on Av. Álvaro Obregón
facts.doña_marta_bread_5am: upstairs neighbor Doña Marta bakes bread at 5am
facts.la_polar_cantina_below: cantina 'La Polar' below the apartment, Friday noise
facts.lapsed_catholic: lapsed Catholic, lights candles for Mama Lupita on her birthday
facts.yamaha_fg800_guitar: owns Yamaha FG800 acoustic guitar, rarely plays
facts.savings_45k_usd: has ~45k USD saved in CETES + USD index
facts.student_loan_8k: 8k USD remaining on ITESM student loan

beats.title: Mother-in-law's funeral in São Paulo
beats.summary: Beatriz Ferreira, Camila's mother, dies of pancreatic cancer. Seb and Camila fly to São Paulo for the funeral. Numb week — logistics of grief, jet-lagged, vegetarian in churrasco country, Camila inconsolable. Hugo Ferreira sr (Camila's dad) suddenly widowed at 68.
beats.mood: shock, exhaustion, tender grief, secondary survivor's guilt

first_disclosures.mother_in_law_died: Beatriz Ferreira, Camila's mom, dies of pancreatic cancer
first_disclosures.hugo_widowed_68: Camila's dad Hugo Ferreira sr widowed at 68
first_disclosures.vegetarian_in_churrasco_country: navigating vegetarianism at Brazilian churrasco wakes
first_disclosures.hugo_will_visit_monthly: Hugo sr starts visiting monthly post-funeral
first_disclosures.relocation_briefly_considered: brief talk: Camila moving back to São Paulo, rejected

beats.category_distribution_hint: high emotion, low project — emotion/relationship/family-grief turns dominate

beats.title: Return to CDMX, numbness, promo cycle starts
beats.summary: Back in CDMX. Camila on bereavement leave. Seb returns to work, Daniela mentions end-of-year promo cycle is open and she's putting Seb up for Senior. Awkward to be excited while girlfriend grieves. RouteOpt service Python/Django mentioned as slow.

first_disclosures.promo_brewing_senior: end-of-year promo cycle, Seb up for Senior
first_disclosures.manager_daniela_otero: manager Daniela Otero putting Seb up
first_disclosures.routeopt_python_django_slow: RouteOpt service is currently Python/Django, slow
first_disclosures.camila_back_to_work_partial: Camila returning part-time to Foster + Partners

beats.category_distribution_hint: work/career returns, grief recedes but lingers

beats.title: Promo passed, espresso machine, pose-estimation side project starts
beats.summary: Promo lands month 2 — 18% bump. Awkward joy. Seb buys Lelit Mara X espresso machine month 3 as guilt-tinged celebration. Month 4 starts kickboxing form-analysis side project, initially with TensorFlow.
beats.mood: cautiously upbeat, building momentum, nerdy excitement about side project

first_disclosures.lelit_mara_x_purchase: bought Lelit Mara X espresso machine, ~30k MXN
first_disclosures.pose_estimation_project_started: starts pose-estimation app for kickboxing form analysis
first_disclosures.pablo_test_user_for_pose: Pablo will test pose-est on his sparring video

beats.category_distribution_hint: career win, hobby/side-project, occasional grief callback

beats.title: Pose-est ramping, TensorFlow → MediaPipe pivot, dad health flare
beats.summary: Pose-est project: TensorFlow too slow on CPU, pivots to MediaPipe. Dad has minor angina episode, doctor adjusts statin dose. Seb reflects on regret of not visiting abuela Lupita before her 2019 death.

first_disclosures.tensorflow_pivot_to_mediapipe: pivoting from TensorFlow to MediaPipe Pose for speed
first_disclosures.dad_angina_episode: dad Hugo had a minor angina episode month 4, statin dose adjusted
first_disclosures.abuela_lupita_regret_unvisited: regrets not visiting abuela Lupita in her last year before 2019 death
first_disclosures.yoga_camila_resentful: Camila makes Seb do Sunday yoga, he resents it

beats.title: Postgres prod outage, post-mortem, rust migration kickoff, Nube adopted
beats.summary: Month 5: 4-hour Postgres prod outage on RouteOpt. Seb writes the post-mortem. Catalyst for rust migration: month 6 kicks off RouteOpt rust rewrite, Seb is tech lead. Same week, Seb and Camila adopt Nube from Hocicos Felices rescue.

first_disclosures.routeopt_rust_kickoff: month 6 kicks off RouteOpt rust migration
first_disclosures.seb_tech_lead: Seb is tech lead on the rust migration
first_disclosures.postgis_blocker_initial: initial blocker: tokio-postgres doesn't natively support PostGIS geography type
first_disclosures.nube_adopted_month6: Nube adopted month 6 from Hocicos Felices rescue
first_disclosures.nube_blue_heeler_female: Nube is a female blue heeler (Australian Cattle Dog)

beats.category_distribution_hint: incident pain heavy, tech shift heavy, dog warmth at end

beats.title: Rust early hurdles, Nube settling in, kid-timing tension with Camila
beats.summary: Rust migration: writing custom PostGIS encoder for tokio-postgres. Nube is settling, has separation anxiety. Camila brings up kid-timing — she wants to start trying within 2 years; Seb panics a bit. They start couples therapy.

first_disclosures.postgis_custom_encoder_solution: wrote custom PostGIS geography encoder for tokio-postgres
first_disclosures.kid_timing_camila_wants_2yr: Camila wants to try for kids within 2 years
first_disclosures.therapist_dr_munoz: therapist is Dr. Carmen Muñoz in Condesa
first_disclosures.portuguese_b1_progress: Portuguese now at solid B1 — Camila's family WhatsApps in Portuguese

beats.title: Brown belt, Daniela's exit, Seb's birthday
beats.summary: Brown belt earned at Atlas Box mid-month, after 6-belt-grade test. Daniela Otero announces she's leaving Brújula for a Series A startup; Roberto Sánchez announced as replacement. Seb turns 33 (June 4). 3 sessions of couples therapy then they pause.

first_disclosures.brown_belt_earned_month8: brown belt earned at Atlas Box month 8
first_disclosures.daniela_leaves_brujula: Daniela Otero leaves Brújula for a Series A startup
first_disclosures.roberto_sanchez_announced: Roberto Sánchez announced as new manager

beats.category_distribution_hint: kickboxing achievement, work-political transition, birthday low-key

beats.title: Rent shock, Roberto starts, La Polar Friday noise
beats.summary: Landlord raises Roma Norte rent 28k → 33k MXN (18%). Argument about hot water. Roberto Sánchez starts as manager — already micro-managing standup. La Polar cantina noise reaches new heights on Fridays.
beats.mood: irritated, micro-aggressed, urban CDMX living friction

first_disclosures.rent_increase_28_33k: rent increased from 28k MXN to 33k MXN
first_disclosures.rent_increase_argument_hot_water: argued with landlord about hot water during the rent renegotiation
first_disclosures.la_polar_friday_noise_complaint: La Polar cantina Friday noise reaching peak

beats.title: Mom's lump scare, Guadalajara emergency trip, back tweak
beats.summary: Mom Isabela calls about a lump on her neck. CT scan scheduled. Seb flies to Guadalajara, anxiety peaks, takes 1 week off. Same week tweaks lower back during sparring — Profe Esteban makes him sit out a Wednesday.
beats.mood: high stakes worry, family closeness, body breaking down

first_disclosures.mom_lump_neck: mom Isabela found a lump on her neck
first_disclosures.seb_flies_guadalajara_1wk: Seb flies to Guadalajara, takes 1 week off
first_disclosures.back_tweak_sparring_month10: tweaked lower back during sparring at Atlas Box
first_disclosures.profe_makes_sit_out_wed: Profe Esteban makes him sit out a Wednesday class

beats.category_distribution_hint: family crisis dominant, body pain emergent

beats.title: Mom's lipoma — benign, pose-est paused, Camila's Pritzker nomination
beats.summary: Mom's lump is a lipoma — benign. Profound relief. Seb pauses pose-est side project to focus on rust + recover. Starts physical therapy at Clínica Querétaro for back. Camila's firm gets her nominated for Pritzker Prize student-mentor recognition. Industry buzz.

first_disclosures.back_pt_clinic_queretaro: back physical therapy at Clínica Querétaro started
first_disclosures.camila_pritzker_nomination: Camila nominated for Pritzker Prize student-mentor recognition through her firm
first_disclosures.rust_blocker_memory_regression: rust migration hits memory regression — Tokio task spawning leak suspected

beats.category_distribution_hint: relief afterglow, technical regression, partner success

beats.title: Bogotá transfer declined, brother engaged, Nube thunder panic
beats.summary: Brújula offers Seb a transfer to Bogotá office to lead infra there. He declines — Camila's career, Nube. Brother Mateo announces engagement to Sofía Aguirre, dental hygienist. Trip to Tijuana planned. Nube starts panic attacks during the season's first thunderstorms. Vet prescribes trazodone.
beats.mood: strategic life choices, family widening, dog distress

first_disclosures.bogota_transfer_offered: Brújula offers Bogotá office transfer to lead infra
first_disclosures.mateo_engaged_sofia: Mateo engaged to Sofía Aguirre, dental hygienist in Tijuana
first_disclosures.nube_thunder_panic_first: Nube has first thunder panic attack

beats.category_distribution_hint: career fork, family expansion, pet distress

beats.title: Chess board woodworking starts, Festool router, back PT progressing
beats.summary: Seb plans cedar chess board for Camila's dad Hugo Ferreira sr's 70th birthday (3 months away). Buys Festool TS 55 REQ plunge router and Veritas chisels. Drives to Maderería El Roble in Toluca for cedar planks. First-time woodworker, makes mistakes — wrong grain orientation, has to re-plane. Back PT helping ~50%.
beats.mood: creative, beginner's-mind humility, body slowly improving

first_disclosures.chess_board_project_kickoff: cedar chess board for Hugo Ferreira sr's 70th
first_disclosures.festool_router_purchased: bought Festool TS 55 REQ plunge router
first_disclosures.madereria_el_roble_toluca_trip: drove to Maderería El Roble in Toluca for cedar planks
first_disclosures.wrong_grain_oriented_replane: first attempt: wrong grain orientation, had to re-plane

beats.category_distribution_hint: new hobby, project-management of woodworking, body recovery

beats.title: Rust late-stage runtime starvation, black belt prep, insomnia surfaces
beats.summary: Rust migration: load test reveals Tokio runtime starvation under burst load. Seb bumps to multi-thread runtime — fixes it. Black belt prep intensifies — extra Saturday classes. Insomnia begins — wakes at 3am, mind churning. Tries melatonin, helps a bit. Tries CBT-I app, doesn't stick.
beats.mood: technical perfectionism, athletic grind, sleep collapsing

first_disclosures.tokio_runtime_starvation_burst: Tokio runtime starvation under burst load discovered in load test
first_disclosures.black_belt_prep_extra_saturdays: extra Saturday black-belt prep classes at Atlas Box
first_disclosures.carla_vela_back_from_leave: Carla Vela back from parental leave on RouteOpt team

beats.category_distribution_hint: tech triumph, athletic prep, sleep collapse

beats.title: Black belt awarded, family flies in
beats.summary: Black belt — first dan — earned at Atlas Box. Profe Esteban hands belt personally. Pablo records on phone. Mom Isabela and dad Hugo fly in from Guadalajara, see Seb test. Brother Mateo flies from Tijuana with Sofía. Camila throws small party. Seb's lifelong-dream moment.
beats.mood: peak life happiness, family pride, exhaustion

first_disclosures.black_belt_earned_month15: black belt — first dan — earned at Atlas Box
first_disclosures.profe_hands_belt_personally: Profe Esteban hands belt personally on the mat
first_disclosures.pablo_records_phone_video: Pablo records the moment on phone
first_disclosures.family_flies_in_for_belt: mom, dad, brother, Sofía all fly in for the test
first_disclosures.camila_throws_small_party: Camila organizes a small party at apartment after

beats.category_distribution_hint: lifetime achievement, family closeness — short triumphant turns + one long reflective turn

beats.title: Rust ships staging, chess board warps, MIT brewing
beats.summary: Month 16: RouteOpt rust ships to staging. Metrics: Python 340ms p95 → Rust 38ms p95. Chess board: warping in one corner from CDMX humidity, has to re-glue and clamp. Insomnia hits worst point — 4-5 hours of sleep average. Seb starts thinking about MIT Media Lab masters.
beats.mood: professional triumph, hands-on frustration, sleep-deprived rumination

first_disclosures.chess_board_warping_corner: chess board has warping in one corner from CDMX humidity
first_disclosures.insomnia_4_to_5_hours: insomnia at peak — 4-5 hours sleep avg
first_disclosures.mit_media_lab_brewing: starts thinking seriously about MIT Media Lab masters
first_disclosures.rosalind_picard_target_advisor: thinking of Rosalind Picard as target advisor

beats.category_distribution_hint: tech ship-day rush, woodworking frustration, sleep dread, future dreams

beats.title: Chess board complete, Hugo's 70th party, MIT app drafted
beats.summary: Chess board finished — beeswax-finished cedar with magnetic walnut pieces. Gifted at Hugo Ferreira sr's 70th party in CDMX (Hugo flew in from São Paulo). Hugo cries. MIT Media Lab masters app drafted — personal statement theme: ML for nonverbal feedback in physical training.
beats.mood: deeply tender, creative satisfaction, intellectual ambition

first_disclosures.chess_board_complete_beeswax: chess board finished with beeswax finish, magnetic walnut pieces
first_disclosures.personal_statement_theme_ml_physical: personal statement theme: ML for nonverbal feedback in physical training

beats.title: MIT app submitted, future rumination, decompression
beats.summary: Month 18 (now): MIT app submitted. Recommendation letters from Daniela Otero (former mgr), Dr. Patricia Lozano (ITESM thesis advisor), Pablo Mendoza (peer wildcard). 7 drafts of personal statement. Awaiting decision. Seb in decompression mode — back pain plateau, insomnia easing, considering future of career: stay backend or pivot to research.

first_disclosures.rec_letter_daniela_otero: rec letter from Daniela Otero (former mgr)
first_disclosures.rec_letter_lozano_itesm: rec letter from Dr. Patricia Lozano (ITESM thesis advisor)
